purpose: The primary identifier of an object — title plus optional secondary text. Used as the lead cell in tables/lists and headlines in ObjectHeader.
whenToUse: When the object title needs an associated description
whenNotToUse: When title alone suffices — use Title or Text
doRules: Use as the first/primary cell content in tables and lists
Use titleActive=true when title is clickable to drill down
Keep title short; use text for the description
Pair with ObjectStatus for status columns
dontRules: Do not use as standalone — always inside a row/item context
Do not duplicate title and text content
Do not omit the secondary text when context aids clarity

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Title is the primary identifier; text gives secondary context
When titleActive=true, title is keyboard-activatable as link
